title: taraxacum serotinum subsp. haussknechtii
intro: Taraxacum serotinum subsp. haussknechtii, also known as the late dandelion, is a subspecies of the dandelion plant, characterized by its yellow flowers and jagged leaves. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum serotinum subsp. haussknechtii include its ability to act as a diuretic, reducing water retention and alleviating symptoms of urinary tract infections. The plant is also rich in antioxidants, which have been linked to various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Taraxacum serotinum subsp. haussknechtii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to support digestive health and reduce symptoms of fever.
